meaning: n.(神经的)轴突 轴突(输出端)
examples: In certain pseudounipolar neurons, the electrical impulse travels along an axon from the periphery to the cell body.
There's an axon leading from your spinal cord to your big toe for instance.
An over the counter equivalent is' Axon ', a type of aerosol sore throat spray.
Representatives of Ziff Brothers, Jana, TPG-Axon, Jennison, UBS and Deutsche Bank declined to comment.
Tony Axon, of the lecturers' union UCU, said training had improved in recent years.
